_comment: Desired state of Pocket-ID OIDC clients + groups (ADR 0022). BIJECTIVE: anything not listed here is PRUNED by the reconciler. It manages policy only, never client secrets. To add an app: create its client here, run the reconciler, then bootstrap the new client_secret into that app's SOPS by hand.

clients._comment: MACHINE client for the agent broker's vault adapter (agent-broker plan P5). No callbackURLs: it never runs authorization_code — only client_credentials, whose token carries the client identity in sub=client-<uuid>. That UUID is what MCP_ALLOWED_CLIENT_IDS lists on the vault MCP, and what makes an aud-forged token from any OTHER client fail. Its client_secret lives ONLY in the vault-adapter's SOPS Secret and never enters a loge.
clients.name: agent_broker_vault
